seoTitle: Surfside vs Surry Hills — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Surfside and Surry Hills. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Surfside vs Surry Hills: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Surfside and Surry Hills.
heading: Surfside vs Surry Hills — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Surfside, New South Wales and Surry Hills, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Surfside has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Surry Hills (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Surfside or Surry Hills safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Surfside has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Surry Hills scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Surfside scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Surry Hills scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Surfside or Surry Hills?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Surfside has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
